title: SmartStore - 8x Plastic Storage Box with Lid Classic 1.5L (20x15x11cm) |Storage Drawers|Food-Safe Material|Kitchen & Organisation|BPA-Free|Durable Container for Home & Office|10-Year Warranty
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Stackable: The sturdy plastic storage boxes with lids can be securely stacked, creating space-saving order in home, office, basement, or kids' room—ideal for organised storage.
Extra durable: Reinforced corners, sturdy clips, and high-quality plastic make this plastic storage box with lid robust. Ideal for heavy items and long-term use.
Food safe: These odourless stackable storage boxes with lids are made from new materials, BPA and phthalate-free. Perfect for hygienic storage of supplies, pet food, or kitchen accessories.
Strong closure: The clear stackable boxes features a recycled clip lid, ensuring secure closure and content protection. Easy to use, durable, and practical for everyday use.
Made in Sweden: SmartStore offers a 10-year warranty and 30 years of expertise. This set impresses with durable quality and functional design. Ideal storage boxes with lids.
